name: devflow
description: DevFlow autonomous development system for Claude Code

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system. 34 skills, 12 agents, wave-based parallelization, atomic commits, and persistent state across context resets.

plugins.name: social-media-generator
plugins.description: Generate social media images and videos using HTML/CSS templates with AI-generated imagery via Replicate. Supports Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter/X.
